steps.title: Find the shared claim
steps.content: Text 1 says Nowak and colleagues used barriers to keep root systems separate. Text 2 agrees that this step excluded root-to-root transmission, even though it questions whether other pathways remained possible. That limited agreement is the key.

steps.title: Avoid overclaiming the design
steps.content: Choice A goes further than Text 2 allows, Choice B contradicts the need to let fungal strands pass, and Choice C is unsupported by Text 2. The remaining choice states the shared root-barrier point. The answer is D.
